prompts.text: {player1}, the DJ has arrived! Take 2 sips to start the set.
{player1}, hand out 3 sips — you're picking the opening track tonight.
{player1}, name your all-time favorite genre. Take 1 sip.

First to shout it out: What Beatles album features them walking across a crosswalk? Winner gives out 2 sips.
prompts.answer: Abbey Road — the zebra crossing on Abbey Road in London

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Which Beatle was barefoot on the Abbey Road cover, sparking 'Paul is Dead' conspiracy theories? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: Paul McCartney

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What was the name of the Beatles' rooftop concert — their last live performance? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: The rooftop concert atop Apple Corps at 3 Savile Row, London, January 30, 1969

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Led Zeppelin's 'Stairway to Heaven' was never released as a single. True or false? Winner gives out 2 sips.
prompts.answer: True — despite being one of the most requested radio songs ever, it was never a commercial single

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What does 'AC/DC' stand for? Winner gives out 2 sips.
prompts.answer: Alternating Current / Direct Current — the band members saw it on a sewing machine label

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What Pink Floyd album has a prism on its cover? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Who is the 'Godfather of Soul'? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: The Rolling Stones' tongue logo was inspired by what Hindu goddess? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: Kali — designer John Pasche was inspired by Mick Jagger's lips and images of Kali's tongue

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What Queen song has no chorus and was considered too long for radio at nearly 6 minutes? Winner gives out 2 sips.
prompts.answer: 'Bohemian Rhapsody' — the label said it was too long but DJ Kenny Everett played it 14 times in one weekend

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Freddie Mercury's real name was Farrokh Bulsara. What country was he born in? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What guitarist is known for playing left-handed on a right-handed guitar flipped upside down? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What band's drummer, Keith Moon, was famous for destroying his drum kit on stage and driving a car into a swimming pool? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What was the first music video ever played on MTV when it launched on August 1, 1981? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Michael Jackson's 'Thriller' music video was directed by who — a famous horror film director? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What Michael Jackson dance move was actually patented using special shoes with ankle hitches? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Prince changed his name to an unpronounceable symbol. What did people call him during that time? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What Madonna song was banned by the Vatican? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What instrument did Phil Collins famously play before becoming a lead singer? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What 80s band's name came from a type of fabric used in tailoring? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Whitney Houston's 'I Will Always Love You' was originally written and recorded by who? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What Nirvana song starts with the lyrics 'Load up on guns, bring your friends'? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Kurt Cobain famously wore what type of clothing from thrift stores that became a fashion trend? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Eminem's real name is Marshall Mathers. What does 'Eminem' come from? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What was the first hip-hop song to reach #1 on the Billboard Hot 100? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: 'Rapture' by Blondie (1981) — though 'Rapper's Delight' by Sugarhill Gang is the first mainstream rap hit (peaked #36 in 1979)

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What city is considered the birthplace of hip-hop? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What does 'DJ' stand for? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Lil Nas X's 'Old Town Road' was removed from the Billboard Country chart. Why? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What Marvin Gaye album was inspired by stories his brother told him about the Vietnam War? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What is the most-played instrument in the world? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What famous music festival in 1969 attracted 400,000 people to a farm in New York? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What happened to the Milli Vanilli guys after they won a Grammy? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What band played on as the Titanic sank? Winner gives out 2 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Elvis Presley's manager, Colonel Tom Parker, was secretly what? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Don McLean's 'American Pie' references 'the day the music died.' What event is that? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What Beatles song was the first to use feedback as a deliberate musical element? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What country has the most #1 Billboard Hot 100 hits per capita? Winner gives out 3 sips.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What instrument is banned in Antarctica research stations because it's too annoying? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: The bagpipes — several Antarctic stations have informal bans on them due to close living quarters

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Spotify's most-played song ever is what? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: 'Blinding Lights' by The Weeknd — over 4 billion streams (as of 2024)

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What famous musician is technically a college dropout who later had an honorary doctorate? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: Kanye West — dropped out of Chicago State University. His debut album was literally called 'The College Dropout.' Later received honorary degrees.

prompts.text: {player1}, hum a song. If nobody guesses it in 10 seconds, take 3 sips.
{player1}, what's your most-played song on Spotify/Apple Music? If it's embarrassing, take 3 sips.
{player1}, sing the chorus of your favorite song right now or take 4 sips.
{player1}, what's your guilty pleasure song? Take 2 sips for the confession.
{player1}, what concert changed your life? No answer = take 3 sips.
{player1}, what artist do you listen to that nobody else here does? Take 1 hipster sip.
{player1}, what song makes you cry every time? Take 2 emotional sips.
{player1}, what's the worst song you know all the lyrics to? Prove it or take 3 sips.
{player1}, do an air guitar solo for 10 seconds or take 3 sips.
{player1}, what song do you want played at your funeral? Group judges — weird pick = 3 sips.
{player1}, what album would you take to a desert island? Group votes — bad pick = 3 sips.
{player1}, name a song that everyone at this table knows. If anyone doesn't know it, take 2 sips.

{player1}, what artist did you LOVE as a kid but now deny? Take 2 sips for the betrayal.
{player1}, play the first 5 seconds of a song on your phone. Nobody guesses? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, what's the most overrated song of all time? If anyone disagrees, you both drink 2 sips.
{player1}, whistle a tune. Nobody guesses in 10 seconds? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, what's the last song you had stuck in your head? Sing it or take 3 sips.
{player1}, have you ever walked out of a concert? Yes = 2 sips. No = you're patient, take 1.
{player1}, what band/artist do you think is underrated? Take 1 sip of good taste.
{player1}, what song reminds you of your ex? Take {sip_count} sips of memories.
{player1}, do your best impression of a famous singer. Group guesses — fail = 3 sips.
{player1}, what's the most you've ever paid for concert tickets? Over $200? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, have you ever been to a music festival? Yes = take 1. No = take 2, you're missing out.
{player1}, what's your shower song? Sing the chorus or take 3 sips.
{player1}, name a one-hit wonder. If someone names a second song by them, take 3 sips — they weren't a one-hit wonder.
{player1}, what's the first album you ever bought? If it's embarrassing, take 3 sips.
{player1}, have you ever lied about liking a song to impress someone? Yes = 2 sips of fraud.
{player1}, do a drumroll on the table for 5 seconds. If anyone laughs, they take 2 sips.
{player1}, what artist would you see live if you could go back in time? Take 1 sip of longing.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever has the worst music taste at this table.
{player1}, give 2 sips to whoever can't name a song right now.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever listens to the most basic music.
{player1}, give 2 sips to whoever would survive the least time at a metal concert.

{player1}, give out {sip_count} sips — you're the headliner tonight.

{player1}, give out as many sips as music documentaries you've watched. Max 5. Zero? Take 1.

{player1}, give out as many sips as times you've been in the front row at a concert. Max 5.
{player1}, give out as many sips as songs you know ALL the lyrics to. Divide by 10, max 6.
{player1}, give out as many sips as decades of music you listen to (60s, 70s, 80s, etc.). Max 6.
{player1}, give out as many sips as music apps on your phone. Max 5.
{player1}, give out as many sips as times you've been to a jazz club. Max 5. Zero? Take 1.
{player1}, give out as many sips as concerts where you bought the merch. Max 5.
{player1}, give out as many sips as different countries' music you listen to. Max 5.
{player1}, give out as many sips as songs in your 'On Repeat' playlist. Max 6.

{player1} is the DJ. They pick the vibe for the next {rule_turns} rounds. Anyone who complains takes 2 sips.
No saying any song titles for {rule_turns} rounds. Slip up and take 2 sips.
{player1} is the Music Critic. They judge everyone's music opinions for {rule_turns} rounds. Bad take = 2 sips.
Everyone must snap before drinking for the next {rule_turns} rounds. Forget? Take an extra sip.
No saying any artist names for {rule_turns} rounds. Slip up and take 2 sips.
Must sing your sentence instead of saying it for {rule_turns} rounds. Speaking normally = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Singing rule is over. Your voice is free.

prompts.text: {player1} is the Hype Man. They must cheer and gas up whoever is drinking for {rule_turns} rounds.
Everyone must air guitar after taking sips for {rule_turns} rounds. Forget = extra sip.
No using the word 'like' for {rule_turns} rounds. Say it = 2 sips.
{player1} picks a genre. Everyone must name a song from that genre before drinking for {rule_turns} rounds. Can't = extra sip.
Must do a little dance move before each sip for {rule_turns} rounds.
{player1} is the Bouncer. They can deny one person's 'give out sips' per round for {rule_turns} rounds.
Everyone must whisper for {rule_turns} rounds. Normal volume = 2 sips.
No putting your drink down for {rule_turns} rounds. Put it down = 1 sip.
prompts.rule_end_text: You can finally put your drink down.

prompts.text: {player1} is the Producer. They can remix any prompt — change the sip count up or down by 1 for {rule_turns} rounds.
Must say 'encore!' after anyone finishes their sips for {rule_turns} rounds. Forget = 1 sip.
{player1} picks a banned word. Anyone who says it for {rule_turns} rounds takes 2 sips.
Everyone must make a 'dun dun' sound effect before giving out sips for {rule_turns} rounds.
No crossing your arms for {rule_turns} rounds. Cross = 2 sips.
{player1} is the Roadie. They take 1 sip whenever someone else takes 3+ sips for {rule_turns} rounds. Solidarity.
Must clap twice before each sip for {rule_turns} rounds.
No saying the name of anyone at the table for {rule_turns} rounds. Use nicknames. Slip = 2 sips.
Before each sip, name a song. Repeat a song someone already said = extra sip. {rule_turns} rounds.
Double encore! All sip counts are doubled for {rule_turns} rounds.
prompts.rule_end_text: Double sips are over. Back to normal.

prompts.text: {player1} is the Playlist Curator. After each prompt they decide if it was 'fire' or 'skip.' Skip = everyone takes 1 sip. {rule_turns} rounds.
{player1}, name 5 rock bands in 10 seconds or take 3 sips.
{player1}, name 5 rappers in 10 seconds or take 3 sips.

{player1}, the crowd booed you off stage. Take {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, your album flopped. Take 5 sips.
{player1}, the venue cancelled your show. Take 4 sips.
{player1}, you got auto-tuned out of existence. Take {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, the record label dropped you. Take 5 sips.
{player1}, your concert sold 0 tickets. Take 4 sips of shame.
{player1}, your demo tape was used as a coaster. Take {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, the DJ cut your song. Take 4 sips.
{player1}, you played the wrong note at Carnegie Hall. Take 5 sips.
{player1}, your band kicked you out. Take {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, you forgot the lyrics on stage. Take 4 sips.
{player1}, the sound system broke during your set. Take 5 sips.
{player1}, your streaming numbers are in the single digits. Take {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, you were the opening act nobody came early for. Take 4 sips.
{player1}, your guitar string snapped mid-solo. Take 5 sips.
Heaven! Last person to point up drinks 3 sips. The drop just hit!
Floor! Last person to point down drinks 3 sips. Bass drop!
{player1}, Would You Rather: give up music for a year OR drink 5 sips right now?
Freestyle round! {player1} has 15 seconds to rap about anything. Group judges — fail and take 4 sips.
{player1}, pick the next song everyone has to listen to. Anyone who skips takes 3 sips.
Concert roll call! Go around — everyone names the best concert they've ever been to. No concert? Take 3 sips.
Sing-along! {player1} starts singing a song. Anyone who doesn't join in by the chorus takes 2 sips.
Battle of the bands! {player1} and {player2} each sing 10 seconds of a song. Group votes — loser takes 4 sips.
Save point! Everyone take a sip together. Cheers to good music.
Encore! The last prompt repeats. Everyone takes 1 extra sip this time.
